# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-service-server-8080
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-service # Targets pods labeled 'app: api-service'
  port: 8080           # Exposes port 8080 for the main API
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-service-auth-from-web-app
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: api-service-server-8080
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: web-app-sa # Allows connections from the 'web-app-sa' service account
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-service-server-8081
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-service # Targets pods labeled 'app: api-service'
  port: 8081           # Exposes port 8081 for metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-service-auth-from-prometheus
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: api-service-server-8081
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: prometheus-sa # Allows connections from the 'prometheus-sa' service account
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: db-service-server-5432
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db-service # Targets pods labeled 'app: db-service'
  port: 5432          # Exposes port 5432 for the database
  proxyProtocol: Opaque # Use Opaque for protocols Linkerd shouldn't interpret (like database connections)
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: db-service-auth-from-api-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: db-service-server-5432
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: api-service-sa # Allows connections from the 'api-service-sa' service account
        namespace: default
